title: Canvas 2D Engine Core — Replace CSS Grid with Canvas renderer
description: Replace the Phase 1 CSS Grid rendering with a Canvas 2D game engine. Canvas component with requestAnimationFrame loop, tile-based rendering, camera system (pan/zoom), click/hover detection, integer zoom for pixel-perfect rendering, ResizeObserver for responsive sizing. Keeps SidePanel and GameHeader as React components.

in: requestAnimationFrame game loop with ref-based state and dirty flag (NO separate game-loop.ts)
Camera system with pan (drag) and zoom (scroll wheel, integer steps 1-4x, cursor-anchored)
Tile rendering with hex color map matching current Tailwind classes
Click/hover detection with screen-to-tile coordinate conversion (inline in CanvasOffice)
HiDPI/DPR scaling: canvas.width = cssWidth * dpr, ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
Hover highlights, selection ring, cursor management on interactive tiles
Grid centering when viewport > grid at default zoom
out: Agent movement and AI behavior (Phase 2 Project 3)

dod.criterion: CanvasOffice.tsx renders the 20x14 office grid on Canvas with tile colors matching current CSS Grid
Agent desks show colored dots (brand color) and status dots matching current OfficeGrid
Mouse click on interactive tiles fires onTileClick with correct (row, col, tileType)
Scroll wheel zooms in integer steps (1x-4x) with pixel-perfect rendering
Mouse drag pans camera, constrained to office bounds
Canvas auto-sizes via ResizeObserver, default zoom fits full office
Hover over interactive tiles shows visual highlight
Type-check and build pass with zero errors
engine/types.ts with CameraState (zoom, offsetX, offsetY)

tasks.title: T2: Camera math — pure functions, cursor-anchored zoom, grid centering

dod.criterion: engine/camera.ts with worldToScreen, screenToTile, clampToBounds, fitToView, zoomAtPoint
All functions are pure (no state, no React imports)
zoomAtPoint anchors to cursor position, not viewport center
Grid centers when viewport > grid at default zoom

tasks.title: T3: Input handling — inline in CanvasOffice (input.ts deleted as dead code)

dod.criterion: Input handling maps raw DOM events to semantic actions (click, pan, zoom, hover)
Drag detection: delta < 4px = click, >= 4px = pan

tasks.title: T4: Renderer — dispatch table, hex color map, dots, icons

dod.criterion: engine/renderer.ts with render() entry point
Dispatch table TILE_RENDERERS[tileType] for per-tile rendering
Tile fills with hex colors matching current Tailwind classes
Agent brand-color dots + status dots on desk tiles
Tile icons via ctx.fillText (star, T, W, emojis, SRV, agent initials)
Selection highlight (2px blue stroke) and hover highlight (2px lighter stroke)

tasks.title: T5: CanvasOffice component — rAF loop, dirty flag, DPR, ResizeObserver

dod.criterion: CanvasOffice.tsx with same props interface as OfficeGrid (selectedPosition, onTileClick, agentStatuses)
useRef for canvas, camera state, dirty flag, rAF handle, drag state
ResizeObserver sets canvas.width/height = css * dpr, ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
rAF loop checks dirty flag, renders only when needed
Mouse wheel: integer zoom 1x-4x anchored to cursor
Mouse drag: pan camera, clamp to office bounds
Mouse move: hover hit-test on interactive tiles only, cursor style management
imageSmoothingEnabled = false on every resize
Default zoom via fitToView on mount and resize
Zoom level badge as absolute-positioned div overlay

tasks.title: T6: Wire into GamePage — swap OfficeGrid for CanvasOffice

dod.criterion: GamePage.tsx imports CanvasOffice instead of OfficeGrid
Same props passed, SidePanel and GameHeader untouched
npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
npx vite build passes with zero errors
Sarah architecture review passes (engine module boundaries, rAF/store pattern, DPR handling)
Marcus product review passes (zoom UX, click feedback, cursor management)
